info.title: Wildon Control API
info.description: HTTP API surface exposed by control-service.

tags.name: Auditors
tags.description: Temporary read-only control plane auditor account management endpoints.

tags.name: API Clients
tags.description: Control plane API client registry and secret lifecycle endpoints.

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Dashboard summary and real-time data endpoints.

get.description: Lists control-managed users for internal control administrators.

post.description: Creates a normal control-managed identity. Requires `control:users:add`.

get.description: Lists provisioned temporary auditor accounts. Requires admin or superadmin access.

post.description: Creates a temporary read-only control-plane auditor identity. Requires admin or superadmin access.

delete.description: Soft-disables the auditor account and revokes all active sessions. Requires admin or superadmin access.

post.description: Resets the auditor password and revokes all active sessions. Requires admin or superadmin access.

get.description: Returns full scope catalog plus assignable subsets and role defaults. Requires `control:scopes:list`.

get.summary: Get delegated scopes for a user

put.summary: Update delegated scopes for a user

delete.description: Soft-deletes a plan by setting status to archived.

get.description: List control/admin audit logs with cursor pagination and filters.
Cursor-paginated client registry ordered by `client_number` ascending with cursor=`client_ref`.

post.description: Creates a new client. Confidential clients return a one-time `secret_plaintext` in response.
Returns the one-time plaintext secret for confidential clients.

get.summary: Get an email template by name

put.summary: Create or update an email template by name

delete.summary: Delete an email template by name

post.summary: Render an email template by name

get.description: Lists system devices. Admins receive full data. `auditor` tokens with `audit_only` scope may also access this route and receive masked fields.
Searches members across the care index. Admins receive full data. `auditor` tokens with `audit_only` scope may also access this route and receive masked contact fields.

get.summary: Recent SOS and fall alarm requests
